tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Load a URL in the browser session.

tools.name: find_element
tools.description: Locate an element without interacting with it. Raises if not found.

tools.name: send_keys
tools.description: Type text into an input element.

tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Read the visible text content of an element.

tools.name: get_page_source
tools.description: Return the full current DOM as HTML. Used by the Self-Healing Agent to re-locate moved/renamed elements.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a PNG screenshot for evidence, saved to the given path.

tools.name: wait_for
tools.description: Explicit wait for an element to appear before proceeding.

tools.name: execute_script
tools.description: Run arbitrary JavaScript. Heavily deny-listed by guardrails; avoid unless strictly necessary.
